projects.name: Ondo Finance
reasons: RWA 与机构级金融产品非常贴近香港合规市场叙事，是最像高价值目标的一类。
近期有较直接的外部新闻催化
公开信息里出现合规或牌照相关表述；有亚洲扩张信号；偏机构客户或托管/清算场景

mentions.title: Ondo Finance expands tokenized treasury access in Asia with institutional focus

projects.reasonSummary: 公开信息里出现合规或牌照相关表述；有亚洲扩张信号；偏机构客户或托管/清算场景；状态: Researching；负责人: You
projects.fitSummary: RWA 与机构级金融产品非常贴近香港合规市场叙事，是最像高价值目标的一类。
interpretation: Ondo 的叙事不只是 DeFi，而是把传统金融产品搬到链上，这类项目在香港市场通常更容易被认真看待。
如果它在扩张亚洲或找新的分发合作，合规交易所可以被包装成机构触达与品牌认证的一部分。
适合重点研究其现有渠道和受众限制，再判断 OSL 能提供的是上币、机构分发还是联合市场教育。
projects.nextStep: 核验香港和机构渠道诉求，找潜在 warm intro。
sourceNotes: DefiLlama and CoinMarketCap metrics checked March 2026
Ondo official blog cites FinCEN registration and AML/KYC controls
CryptoRank funding: SERIES A on 2022-04-27 with 8 investors
Website/blog signals: institutional, uae, custody, regulated

screening.cexPresence: Large spot volume and broad CEX/DEX presence
institutionalSignals: USDY LLC registered with FinCEN as a Money Services Business
Ondo works with institutional partners like BlackRock and Chainalysis
Global Markets Alliance focuses on investor protections and tokenized securities standards

website.title: Ondo Finance
website.description: Institutional-grade finance, delivered onchain — accessible to all. Explore tokenized real-world assets, including USDY, OUSG, and Ondo Global Markets.

workflow.nextAction: 核验香港和机构渠道诉求，找潜在 warm intro。

公开信息里出现合规或牌照相关表述；存在二级流动性或上所相关语义；出现招聘或组织扩张线索

mentions.title: Ethena hires compliance lead as stablecoin strategy targets broader market access

projects.reasonSummary: 公开信息里出现合规或牌照相关表述；存在二级流动性或上所相关语义；出现招聘或组织扩张线索；状态: Watchlist；负责人: You

contact.label: Official site contact
contact.value: Use the contact entry on ethena.com

projects.fitSummary: 稳定币与机构通道叙事明确，适合优先判断其是否有合规二级流动性扩展需求。
interpretation: Ethena 的核心吸引力在于稳定币和机构场景叙事足够强，容易和香港市场的合规、托管、机构销售语境接上。
如果它正在补合规或 BD 能力，通常意味着它不只满足于链上原生扩张，可能开始在看更正式的分发渠道。
跟进时不建议上来就聊上所，更适合先聊亚洲市场、机构接入和合规分发可能性。
projects.nextStep: 判断是否有合规流动性扩展窗口。
sourceNotes: DefiLlama and CoinMarketCap metrics checked March 2026
Ethena docs/blog cite Copper, Ceffu, Fireblocks and Kraken Custody
DeFiLlama live cache: TVL $5.92B in Basis Trading category
CryptoRank funding: STRATEGIC on 2025-10-01 with 1 investors

screening.cexPresence: CoinMarketCap rank #57 and large CEX/DEX volumes
institutionalSignals: Uses Copper, Ceffu and Fireblocks for off-exchange settlement and custody
Added Kraken Custody as a new custodian
Public backing attestations for USDe

workflow.nextAction: 判断是否有合规流动性扩展窗口。

projects.name: Plume
reasons: RWAfi 生态和亚洲活动密度高，适合优先判断其香港叙事是否正在成型。
近期有较直接的外部新闻催化
与香港市场或 SFC 语境相关；有亚洲扩张信号

mentions.title: Plume pushes RWA growth in Hong Kong and Asia ecosystem conversations

projects.reasonSummary: 与香港市场或 SFC 语境相关；有亚洲扩张信号
projects.fitSummary: RWAfi 生态和亚洲活动密度高，适合优先判断其香港叙事是否正在成型。
interpretation: Plume 的价值不只是单一 token，而是它试图承接 RWA 生态项目和基础设施，这会让它更在意市场叙事与生态影响力。
如果它公开频繁提亚洲、合规、生态扩张，那往往意味着它开始需要更正式的渠道来承接下一阶段品牌和流动性。
更适合从 ecosystem partnership 或 Asia expansion 角度切入，而不是直接问要不要上所。
projects.nextStep: 先看是否有香港活动、合作方或法律结构更新，再发带洞察的短邮件。
sourceNotes: Plume official blog cites 280K+ holders, $645M in RWAs, DigiFT partnership and SEC transfer-agent approval

screening.cexPresence: Market cap and volume both above OSL minimum thresholds
institutionalSignals: Plume says it serves 280,000+ RWA holders and $645M in RWAs
Partnerships with DigiFT, Securitize, BDACS and Circle/USDC
SEC-approved registered transfer agent and chain-level AML claims
complianceSignals: Regulated digital asset offerings via DigiFT
Institutional privacy/compliance stack and transfer-agent approval

website.title: Plume | The public blockchain for scaling RWAs

workflow.nextAction: 先看是否有香港活动、合作方或法律结构更新，再发带洞察的短邮件。

projects.name: Maple
reasons: 机构信贷、托管和合规尽调的语境天然贴近持牌交易平台与机构市场入口。
近期有较直接的外部新闻催化
近期有融资/资本市场信号；公开信息里出现合规或牌照相关表述；偏机构客户或托管/清算场景

mentions.title: Maple raises institutional profile with custody and regulated credit narrative

projects.reasonSummary: 近期有融资/资本市场信号；公开信息里出现合规或牌照相关表述；偏机构客户或托管/清算场景
projects.fitSummary: 机构信贷、托管和合规尽调的语境天然贴近持牌交易平台与机构市场入口。
interpretation: Maple 的机构信贷定位让它不像普通 DeFi 项目，更接近金融基础设施或机构金融服务方。
这类项目如果要强化香港触点，往往不是为了纯散户流量，而是为了机构品牌背书和更正式的市场结构合作。
切入点可以围绕机构客户、分发伙伴、托管与市场接入，而不是单纯 listing pitch。
projects.nextStep: 先判断它在亚洲是否已有合作伙伴，再决定走品牌合作还是上币讨论。
sourceNotes: DefiLlama and CoinMarketCap metrics checked March 2026
Maple official insights cite Bitwise, Cantor and licensed/qualified custody language
DeFiLlama live cache: TVL $2.36B in Lending category
CryptoRank funding: Undisclosed on 2023-08-22 with 8 investors

screening.cexPresence: Token has spot market cap and 24h volume well above minimum threshold
institutionalSignals: Bitwise made its first institutional DeFi allocation via Maple
Maple cites legal agreements, qualified custody and institutional loan sizes up to $250M
Maple and counterparties support SOC 2 Type I compliance
complianceSignals: Secure and compliant infrastructure for institutional allocators

website.title: Maple Finance
website.description: Maple is an onchain Asset Manager with decades of traditional finance and crypto experience. Maple combines deep capital markets expertise with DeFi innovation to offer digital asset lending and yield products.

workflow.nextAction: 先判断它在亚洲是否已有合作伙伴，再决定走品牌合作还是上币讨论。
